name: Sage Grouse Lounge
about: Sage Grouse Lounge is a downtown Gunnison venue combining golf simulation with a full-service lounge and bar experience. The facility features a state-of-the-art indoor golf simulator in a private room that accommodates up to 6 people, allowing for play in any weather. The venue emphasizes a social atmosphere, blending technology with comfort through plush seating, multiple TVs for sports viewing, and a south-facing patio. Alongside golf, the space offers classic games like Brunswick billiards, darts, and arcade options, making it a flexible destination for both golf enthusiasts and casual social gatherings.
why_golfers_like_it: Year-round golf simulation regardless of weather conditions
State-of-the-art simulator with real-time stats and precision tracking
Private room accommodating up to 6 players for group sessions
Flexible booking with multiple rate options including discounted happy hours
Central downtown location near Western Colorado University

food_and_drink.notes: Light bar fare including pizza from a double decker pizza oven, popcorn, nuts, and bars
Full bar with signature cocktails, extensive beer selection (draft, bottled, canned), and wine

simulator_hardware.notes: Photometric technology with three high-speed cameras mentioned

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: No, club rentals are available for $10/hour.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No, the venue offers a full bar and light bar fare on-site. Outside food and drinks are not mentioned as permitted.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time to play 18 holes is not specified, but the simulator is available for hourly rental with a 1-hour minimum.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue is described as welcoming to families and offers activities like arcade games and billiards that can be enjoyed by all ages.
